name: Ogment
description: وكيل AI يعمل داخل Slack — يأتمت المهام المتكررة تلقائياً ويتصل بأكثر من 1000 أداة عبر OAuth
official_description: Ogment is a Slack-native AI coworker that proactively identifies and automates repetitive workflows, connecting to 1,000+ tools via managed OAuth connectors.
description_en: Slack-native AI coworker — proactively automates repetitive tasks and connects to 1,000+ tools via OAuth

name: Viktor
description: موظف AI مشترك للفريق بأكمله في Slack — يتصل بأكثر من 3200 أداة ويُنتج تقارير ولوحات تحكم وأكواد
official_description: Viktor is a managed AI coworker for your entire team in Slack, connected to 3,200+ business tools, delivering real output like reports, dashboards, and code.
description_en: Shared AI employee for your entire Slack team — 3,200+ integrations, reports, dashboards & code execution

name: ChatGPT for Slack
description: تطبيق ChatGPT الرسمي في Slack — لخّص المحادثات، اكتب الردود، وابحث في رسائل Slack من داخل ChatGPT
official_description: The ChatGPT app for Slack brings the power of ChatGPT into Slack. Summarize threads, draft content, search Slack messages, and use ChatGPT Agents directly in channels.
description_en: Official ChatGPT app in Slack — summarize threads, draft replies, and search Slack messages from ChatGPT

name: Claude for Slack
description: وكيل Claude من Anthropic داخل Slack — فكّر واكتب وبرمج مع Claude مباشرة في قنوات فريقك
official_description: Anthropic's AI agent for any task — think, write, and code with Claude directly in your Slack workspace channels and DMs.
description_en: Anthropic's Claude agent in Slack — think, write, and code with Claude directly in your team channels

name: Dust
description: منصة وكلاء AI مخصصين في Slack — أنشئ وكلاء متخصصين لكل مهمة متصلين بمعرفة شركتك
official_description: Dust is the platform to build and operate custom AI agents in Slack, connected to your company knowledge and tools, powered by frontier AI models.
description_en: Platform for custom AI agents in Slack — build specialized agents connected to your company knowledge

name: Adapt
description: وكيل AI متعدد اللاعبين في Slack — استعلم عن أي نظام، شغّل سير العمل، وابنِ تطبيقات من المحادثة
official_description: Adapt is a multiplayer AI agent for Slack. Query any system, trigger workflows, get proactive alerts, build apps in chat, and schedule reports — all from Slack.
description_en: Multiplayer AI agent in Slack — query systems, trigger workflows, build apps from conversation

name: Slack AI
description: ذكاء اصطناعي مدمج في Slack — بحث ذكي في الرسائل، ملخصات القنوات، وإجابات فورية من سجل المحادثات
official_description: Slack AI is built directly into Slack, providing intelligent message search, channel summaries, and instant answers grounded in your Slack conversation history.
description_en: Built-in Slack AI — intelligent message search, channel summaries, and instant answers from conversation history

name: CodeRabbit
description: وكيل AI لمراجعة الكود في Slack — حقق في المشاكل، خطط للتنفيذ، وافتح Pull Requests مباشرة من المحادثة
official_description: CodeRabbit Agent for Slack brings AI-powered code investigation, implementation planning, and PR creation directly into your Slack workspace conversations.
description_en: AI code review agent in Slack — investigate issues, plan implementations, and open PRs from conversation

name: Glean
description: محرك بحث AI للشركات في Slack — يبحث في كل أدوات الشركة ويجيب بمعلومات دقيقة ومصادر
official_description: Glean is an enterprise AI search platform that connects to your company's entire data corpus, providing cited answers and intelligent search directly in Slack.
description_en: Enterprise AI search in Slack — searches across all company tools with cited answers

name: Moveworks
description: وكيل AI لأتمتة خدمات IT والموارد البشرية في Slack — يحل تذاكر الدعم ويجيب على أسئلة الموظفين تلقائياً
official_description: Moveworks is an enterprise AI agent for IT and HR service automation in Slack, automatically resolving support tickets and employee questions.
description_en: Enterprise AI agent for IT & HR service automation in Slack — auto-resolves tickets and employee questions

name: Aisera
description: وكيل AI لمكتب خدمات IT في Slack — يحوّل التذاكر تلقائياً ويوفر دعماً ذاتياً للموظفين
official_description: Aisera provides AI-powered IT service desk automation in Slack, deflecting tickets and enabling employee self-service with conversational AI.
description_en: AI IT service desk agent in Slack — auto-deflects tickets and enables employee self-service

name: Agentforce (Salesforce)
description: وكلاء AI من Salesforce داخل Slack — أتمتة المبيعات والدعم مع قوالب جاهزة ونماذج مخصصة
official_description: Agentforce by Salesforce brings AI agents into Slack for sales, service, and custom workflows with ready-made templates and conversational data context.
description_en: Salesforce AI agents in Slack — sales & service automation with templates and conversational data

name: Perplexity Computer
description: عامل رقمي AI من Perplexity في Slack — يبحث في الإنترنت وينفذ المهام الرقمية نيابة عنك
official_description: Perplexity Computer is an AI general-purpose digital worker in Slack that can browse the web, research topics, and complete digital tasks on your behalf.
description_en: Perplexity's AI digital worker in Slack — browses the web and executes digital tasks for you

name: Cursor for Slack
description: شغّل وكلاء الكود من Cursor وأدرها مباشرة من Slack — برمجة غير متزامنة بدون مغادرة المحادثة
official_description: Run and manage Cursor coding agents asynchronously from Slack — kick off coding tasks and get results without leaving your conversation.
description_en: Run & manage Cursor coding agents from Slack — async coding without leaving your conversation

name: Notion AI for Slack
description: ربط Notion AI بـ Slack — ابحث في مستندات Notion واحصل على إجابات ذكية مباشرة من القنوات
official_description: Connect Notion AI to Slack to search your Notion workspace and get intelligent answers directly in your Slack channels and threads.
description_en: Notion AI connected to Slack — search Notion docs and get smart answers in your channels
